arts.ttl: Newcastle handed harsh reminder by Fulham ahead of Arsenal home leg
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe says his side’s home defeat to Fulham is reminder they will have to be at their very best to see off Arsenal in the League Cup next week. Jacob Murphy put the Magpies in front at St James’ Park, but the visitors turned it around after the break. arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins is substituted at half-time in Aston Villa's clash at Wolves after appearing to suffer an injury - as Arsenal target is one of FOUR changes made by Unai Emery at the interval
arts.sum: Emery reacted to a sluggish performance by his team in Saturday's Premier League clash with Wolves by making four substitutions during the half-time interval.

arts.sum: Arsenal welcome Manchester City to the Emirates as they look to close the gap to Liverpool in the Premier League and Alan Shearer is expecting a tense meeting between the sides

arts.sum: Mohamed Salah's interview after his brace in the away win at Bournemouth left some Liverpool fans picking up on the wording of the match-winner's post-match comments

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta addresses Pep Guardiola’s Man City ‘going backwards’ ahead of Arsenal showdown
arts.sum: Despite being Premier League champions for four consecutive years and eyeing a record-extending fifth, City have encountered challenges this season, barely advancing in the Champions League group phase and doubling last season's loss count in the league already, placing them 12 points behind Liverpool and six behind Arsenal heading into this weekend's clash at the Emirates Stadium. Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has voiced his thoughts on Pep Guardiola's situation at Manchester City, suggesting the high standards he set leave little room for him to impress further.

arts.ttl: Man City star admits 'I don't know what's going on in their head' as huge clash looms
arts.sum: After booking their place in the Champions League play-off round, Manchester City will follow a huge Premier League clash against Arsenal with a Real Madrid double-header

arts.ttl: Man Utd sign teenager Heaven from Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester United sign England Under-19s defender Ayden Heaven from Arsenal on a four-and-a-half-year contract.
